case_title: SAN FRANCISCO FIRE CREDIT UNION VS. IGNATIUS J. CARRILLO et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FIRE CREDIT UNION SERVED MAY-01-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CARRILLO, IGNATIUS J.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FIRE CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARRILLO, IGNATIUS J. $2,951.60 PRINCIPAL, $600.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $229.02 INTEREST, $270.00 COSTS, $3,000.00 CREDIT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,050.62, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
